scene: A puzzled doodle stick figure scratching its head while staring down at a keyboard whose keys are all blank little squares, floating question marks above. Flat warm orange background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

An old-timey typewriter with its thin metal type-arms all tangled and jammed together in a frustrated clash, a few spark and collision marks. Flat dusty teal background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A close view of an old typewriter's metal type-arms now spread nicely apart and swinging smoothly without touching, a calm relieved glow. Flat soft blue background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.

A faint ghostly old typewriter fading away above a solid modern computer keyboard with blank keys, a pair of hands resting on the modern keys. Flat coral pink background. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame.
